---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Use Case
Describe why this feature would be useful and what problem it solves.

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe your ideal implementation. Consider:
- UI/UX design
- Technical approach
- Integration with existing features

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request.

## 🎯 Priority
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Would improve experience
- [ ] High - Important for workflow
- [ ] Critical - Blocking issue

## 🔧 Technical Notes
Any technical considerations or implementation details.

## 📋 Dependencies
- [ ] Requires external software (specify)
- [ ] Requires API access (specify)
- [ ] Requires hardware changes
- [ ] No special requirements

## 💬 Discussion
Are you willing to discuss this feature further and potentially contribute to its implementation?
